troparion: (Tone 3) Our help is the God of Jacob;* He protects and defends us;* He is our aid in the day of affliction.
prokimenon: I am poor,* and in labours
Lord, the God of my salvation: I have cried in the day, and in the night before You.
second_prokimenon: We shall walk, O Lord, in the light of Your countenance.
